Package com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules

Class CompositeSubsystem<D extends CompositeData<D>,A extends CompositeIO<D>>

java.lang.Object
edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase
com.stzteam.forgemini.io.IOSubsystem
com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem<D,A>
com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules.CompositeSubsystem<D,A>
Type Parameters:
D - The composite data structure holding the overall subsystem's state.
A - The composite IO interface acting upon the hardware and child modules.
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.wpi.first.util.sendable.Sendable, edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Subsystem
public abstract class CompositeSubsystem<D extends CompositeData<D>,A extends CompositeIO<D>> extends ModularSubsystem<D,A>
A specialized subsystem class for complex mechanisms composed of multiple smaller subsystems. This is ideal for overarching systems like a Drivetrain, where the CompositeSubsystem manages the high-level kinematics and coordinates the individual underlying modules.

  • Method Details

    • getSubsystem

      protected <S extends ModularSubsystem<?, ?>> S getSubsystem(String key)
      A convenience method to access a specific child module directly through the parent subsystem.
      Type Parameters:
      S - The expected type of the child subsystem.
      Parameters:
      key - The identifier key of the child module.
      Returns:
      The requested child subsystem.
